title: harnessed recipe
description: A composable capability bundle added ONTO an agent (catalog/recipes/<name>/recipe.yaml). Harness-independent — no `harnesses:` field; harness-specific build steps branch on ${HARNESS} inside the recipe's Dockerfile. Carries metadata only; build steps live in the Dockerfile. See docs/harnessed-design.md §7/§11.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this recipe contributes.

mcp.description: MCP layer: server entries merged into the stack's hatago config across all recipes.

skills.description: Standalone skill dirs shipped by this recipe (Claude-canonical), fanned into the profile's .claude/skills/. Each entry is a path relative to the recipe dir.

commands.description: Standalone command dirs shipped by this recipe (Claude-canonical), fanned into the profile's .claude/commands/. Each entry is a path relative to the recipe dir.

expect.description: Smoke-check subset the capability test probes after building — for capabilities delivered via the recipe's Dockerfile (which the assembler cannot infer by parsing). Not a completeness oracle.

mcp.description: MCP server names expected connected through the hatago hub.

plugins.description: Vendored Claude plugins (forward field, design §11). Either a marketplace+plugin reference or a url+sha[+subdir] reference.

hooks.description: Claude-canonical hooks shipped by this recipe (forward field, design §11).

event_dir.description: Directory (relative to the recipe) of NN-name.sh handlers grouped under <Event>.d/.

deps.description: Dependency declarations (forward field, design §11). Usually auto-detected from a vendored plugin; declare here for standalone recipes/overrides. uv for Python, pnpm for Node (never npm/npx).

python.description: requirements.txt → `uv pip install -r`; pyproject.toml → `uv venv` + `uv pip install -e .`.

mcpServer.description: One MCP server. A stdio server (with `command`) is run by hatago as a child (stdio→HTTP). A network-native server (`url`/`service`, transport http) is proxied by hatago. `service` and `command` are mutually exclusive.

command.description: Executable for a stdio child server (e.g. uvx). Mutually exclusive with `service`. Never raw npm/npx — use pnpm dlx.

transport.description: Transport. 'stdio' (default) → hatago child; 'http' → Streamable-HTTP URL proxy. 'sse' is deprecated.

url.description: Endpoint for a network-native server (transport http).

service.description: Reference to a shared service (services/<name>); the assembler resolves it to a hatago URL-proxy entry. Mutually exclusive with `command`.

url_env.description: Optional env var injected into the instance carrying the resolved URL.

headers.description: HTTP headers for a network-native server.

fileExt.description: A standalone skill/command dir: a bare path string, or { path: ... }.

plugin.description: A vendored Claude plugin reference: marketplace+plugin, or url+sha[+subdir].
